description_long: This is a plush, modern chaise upholstered in a soft, pale pink fabric with deep button tufting on the inner backrest and armrests, giving it a luxurious, Chesterfield-inspired appearance. The seat is wide and generously cushioned, providing ample space for lounging, while the back and arms are of equal height, creating a cozy, enclosed feel. Decorative metallic nailhead trim outlines the top edges of the arms and back, adding a touch of sophistication and visual interest. The exterior sides and back are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the richly textured interior. The chaise stands on four short, blocky black legs that provide sturdy support and a subtle lift from the ground. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, boutique lounges, or stylish apartment interiors.
description: A luxurious pale pink chaise with deep button tufting, nailhead trim, and a wide cushioned seat, supported by short black legs. The design is plush, enclosed, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep button-tufted backrest and armrests, wide seat cushion, and decorative nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, unadorned exterior side panel and the nailhead trim along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, continuous back panel with nailhead trim along the top, and both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the smooth side panel and nailhead trim, with a glimpse of the tufted interior.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and features deep button tufting in a diamond pattern, giving it a plush, classic look. It is continuous with the armrests and is outlined with metallic nailhead trim for added decoration.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, matching the height of the backrest and featuring the same tufted and nailhead-trimmed design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, block-shaped, and finished in black, providing a sturdy and modern base without decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid pale pink fabric with a prominent diamond-patterned button tufting on the interior surfaces, while the exterior is smooth and unadorned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, loose seat cushion that covers the entire seating area, with no additional loose or layered cushions visible.
